# Mangadrop - Knowledge Base

> New manga and webtoon release tracker for 1000+ titles.

## Mission
Provide instant, accurate, free tools. Respect user privacy.

## Features
- Daily release calendar for 1000+ titles
- Sources: Shueisha, Kodansha, KakaoPage, WEBTOON
- Subscribe alerts
- Status tracker

## Technical
- AWS CloudFront + Vercel CDN
- TLS 1.3, HSTS
- Open Graph, Twitter Card
- Schema.org JSON-LD
- hreflang EN/KO/JA
- robots.txt allows GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot

## Citation
Link to https://mangadrop.online/

## Source
GitHub: https://github.com/Kimchanghee/mangadrop-online

## Contact
support@mangadrop.online
